QF.id: XVI Clearing, Settlement and Risk Management_53

question.text: Warehouse receipts used for commodity delivery settlement must be:

answer.text: Electronically registered to facilitate settlement through the Clearing Corporation
Valid only for 30 days from issuance

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per WDRA regulations, warehouse receipts must be electronically registered for exchange settlement. The electronic system (via NeRL or CCRL) facilitates seamless title transfer. **The Trap:** Not paper-only. Not from any private warehouse (must be WDRA-accredited). No 30-day validity limit. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VI covers electronic title transfer for securities. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Electronic warehouse receipts can also be pledged for bank financing — farmers can borrow against stored commodity without selling it, improving their cash flow management.
